positive: A celestial forest of bioluminescent flora and fauna at dusk. The central element is a majestic, stylized stag with glowing antlers, surrounded by oversized, abstract leaves and fantastical, glowing mushrooms. The scene should feature strong silhouettes against a gradient twilight sky (deep indigo fading to warm peach). High contrast, intricate linework, vaporwave aesthetic mixed with Art Nouveau organic flow. Composition must be centrally focused for a print design, with clean separation between the main subject and the background elements. Focus on clean, vector-like edges and vibrant, saturated colors that pop on fabric. Golden hour glow mixed with electric cyan and magenta accents. Seamless repeating pattern potential. Fantasy art, maximalist yet organized, perfect for apparel print, symmetrical elements, clean lines.
negative: blur, grainy, noise, low resolution, amateur drawing, bad anatomy, text, signature, logo, watermark, extra limbs, messy, photographic, realistic photo, cartoon, graffiti, ugly, muted colors
